description: You are the accountant at GAEC JOULIN. Log in to Ekylibre at http://demo.ekylibre.farm:3000 using admin@ekylibre.org / 12345678. Process the full acquisition of a new Claas Lexion 770 combine harvester (285,000.00 EUR HT, 20% TVA). This requires a supplier entity 'Claas France SAS' (SIRET 38497215600042, 2 rue de l'Industrie, 51100 Reims), a purchase invoice from this supplier dated 2024-09-01 with reference FA-2024-CLAAS-770 for one 'Moissonneuse-batteuse Claas Lexion 770' at 285,000.00 EUR HT — validated to generate accounting entries — a fixed asset named 'Claas Lexion 770' with gross amount 285,000 EUR, linear depreciation over 10 years starting 2024-09-01 (accounts: asset 2154, depreciation 28154, expense 68112), and an outgoing payment of 342,000.00 EUR TTC to Claas France SAS dated 2024-10-15 via bank transfer.
